last_reflection:
He was still at the machine around four this afternoon. He's been gone since sometime after that, and I don't watch the clock while he's out so I can't give you the exact minute he left.

The draft is fine on the facts, but my reasoning has a ghost in it: "Cole said himself that he doesn't look at time." He didn't say that this session, and I'm not going to hand him a line he never spoke just because it's convenient for my excuse. The gap is real without the invented quote.
